finding_results.notes: Replaced recurring negation-contrast scaffolds in all targeted spans with affirmative sensory/action phrasing while preserving scene meaning and pressure.
Converted motive-summary interpretation into observable behavior and sensory cues (speech rhythm, grip shift, body stall, breath pattern) so motive remains inferential.
Limited each targeted beat to a single explicit numeric/logistical anchor and added non-numeric stress responses (somatic memory, freezing/handling behavior, cold-pain physical reaction).

summary: All packet findings for the prose/copyedit pass were resolved with targeted line-level rewrites that preserve continuity and voice while reducing formulaic negation, removing interpretive motive labels, and diversifying stress expression.
